name: Valeo
description: Valeo is a next-generation financial platform that bridges traditional banking with decentralized finance. Built on blockchain technology, Valeo provides users with complete control over their digital assets while delivering the convenience and familiarity of traditional banking services. This document serves as the technical guide for the Valeo ecosystem. It is designed to provide stakeholders, security auditors, and power users with a comprehensive understanding of Valeo’s underlying architecture, security protocols, and operational workflows.
